semantic.role: Automated workflow to execute the research test suite for the ArchSpine project on demand.
responsibilities: Triggering the research bench test job manually via workflow_dispatch
Managing concurrency to cancel in-progress runs for the same workflow and ref
Setting up a Node.js 20 environment with npm cache
Installing project dependencies using npm ci
Running the research test suite via npm run test:research
outOfScope: Scheduled or continuous testing (only manual trigger)

English.purpose: This document defines a GitHub Actions workflow that enables developers to manually run the research benchmark suite for the ArchSpine project. It ensures a consistent and isolated test environment with Node.js 20 and cached dependencies.
English.context_and_audience: This workflow is intended for ArchSpine developers and researchers who need to validate performance or functional aspects of the system under controlled conditions. It is triggered on demand and not part of the standard CI pipeline.
key_takeaways: The research bench is a manual workflow, not automatic — it must be triggered via the GitHub UI or API.
It uses Node 20 and npm ci to guarantee reproducible dependency installation.
Concurrency is configured to cancel any previous in-progress run of the same workflow and branch, preventing redundant test runs.
The actual test logic resides in the project's test:research script; this workflow is merely the orchestration wrapper.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文件定义了一个 GitHub Actions 工作流，使开发者能够手动运行 ArchSpine 项目的研究基准测试套件。它确保在 Node.js 20 和缓存依赖项下提供一致且隔离的测试环境。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 此工作流面向 ArchSpine 的开发者和研究人员，他们需要在受控条件下验证系统的性能或功能方面。它按需触发，不属于标准 CI 流程的一部分。
key_takeaways: 研究基准测试是手动工作流，不会自动运行——必须通过 GitHub UI 或 API 触发。
使用 Node 20 和 npm ci 保证依赖安装的可重复性。
并发配置为取消同一工作流和分支之前的正在进行的运行，防止冗余测试。
实际测试逻辑位于项目的 test:research 脚本中；此工作流仅作为编排包装。
